rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. EDUARDO ROJAS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 12, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT REINA ARGUETA's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Deny. Fails to sustain burden re notice to counsel and register of actons shows defendant Reina Argueta has Laura Furuta as attorney of record. = (501/REQ)
